description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率降低目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the duration of debuffs on the enemy by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, then inflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> on targets without debuffs for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 적이 보유한 약화 효과의 지속 시간을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킨 후, 약화 효과가 없는 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵の弱体効果を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間増加させ、弱体効果がない対象の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使敌人附带的弱化效果持续时间增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,使未附带弱化效果目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nRight after using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to avoid triggering an enemy's Counterattack, Revenge, or Agile Response.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>와 <color=#28d9ed>방어력 감소</color>를 부여합니다.\n이 스킬 직후에는 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 적의 반격, 복수, 신속 대응이 발동하지 않습니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルでは<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵の反撃、復讐、迅速対応が発動しない。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>与<color=#28d9ed>防御力降低</color>效果,持续 <color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n此技能发动后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率不会触发敌人的反击、复仇、迅速应对效果。

description.en: (Passive Effect) When using <color=#28d9ed>Juzumaru Tsunetsugu</color>, increases the duration of the target's debuffs by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>쥬즈마루 츠네즈구</color> 사용 시 대상의 약화 효과 지속 시간이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果) <color=#28d9ed>【数珠丸恒次】</color>使用時、対象の弱体効果のターンが<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)使用<color=#28d9ed>数珠丸恒次</color>时,目标的减益效果持续时间增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) At the start of the turn, increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Crit Chance</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> by <color=#28d9ed>8%</color>. (Max 5 stacks)
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 턴 시작 시 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>8%</color> 증가시킵니다.(최대 5회 누적)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)ターン開始時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>と<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>8%</color>UPさせる。(最大5回累積)
description.zh: (被动效果)回合开始时,全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>与<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提高<color=#28d9ed>8%</color>。(最多叠加5次)

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
